query:
SELECT 
  userId,
  COUNT(*) AS orderCount,
  SUM(totalAmount) AS totalSpent
FROM orders
WHERE userId = 720005
  AND status = 'approved'
  AND paymentStatus = 'approved'
GROUP BY userId;

  COUNT(*) AS orderCount,
  SUM(totalAmount) AS totalSpent

  AND paymentStatus = 'approved'
